Employment (Amendment) Act 2024 Section 1
c
i
e
EMPLOYMENT (AMENDMENT) ACT 2024
Signed in Tynwald: 15 October 2024
Received Royal Assent: 15 October 2024
Announced to Tynwald: 15 October 2024
AN ACT to amend the Employment Act 2006 to make further provision for
family leave rights and whistleblowing; and for connected purposes.
BE IT ENACTED by the King’s Most Excellent Majesty, by and with the advice and
consent of the Council and Keys in Tynwald assembled, and by the authority of the
same, as follows: —
1 Short title
The short title of this Act is the Employment (Amendment) Act 2024.
2 Commencement
(1) This Act (other than section 1 and this section) comes into operation on
such day or days as the Department for Enterprise may by order appoint.1
(2) An order under subsection (1) may include such consequential, incidental,
supplementary, saving, transitional and transitory provision as the
Department for Enterprise considers necessary or expedient.
3 Interpretation
In this Act, a reference to a provision without more is to be construed as a
reference to the provision so numbered in the Employment Act 2006.
4 Amendment of the Employment Act 2006
The Employment Act 2006 is amended as follows.
5 Amendment of section 8
[Amended section 8(1)]
